name: Boys And Girls Club
description: Boys And Girls Club is a place to play pickleball in Craig, CO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Craig City Park
description: Craig City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Craig, CO. There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free.
